name: Kojiro
title: Wandering Swordmaster
description: Rumor has it that a certain gang of thieves has hired an exceptional swordmaster as their guard. Swinging a longsword with unprecedented ease and cutting opponents down without as much as a single sound, she strikes fear in the hearts of those who would rather see the gang gone.

localization.name: Clean Strike
localization.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead and this unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Sakura Storm since this skill was last used. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.
localization.selected: 100%+ damage to 1 enemy & may act again

localization.name: Sakura Storm
localization.description: 200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 500% total damage). This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

localization.name: Healing Blossom
localization.description:
Heals the user fully, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. If the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, this skill becomes locked for 100TU after use instead.

Endure effects cannot stack. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.
localization.selected: Gains Endure, Wards, Purifies & Heals User

localization.name: Swallow's Flight
localization.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has survived for 200TU or more on the battlefield, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if the user has 2+ Charges stored and only 3 times per battle. Consumes 2 Charges on the user.

localization.name: Legendary Resolve
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Endure and Counter Stance for 300TU. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn.

This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks. This reduction is lowered by 10% for each enemy this unit has defeated with an attack while on the battlefield (to a minimum of 50% after defeating 3+ enemies).

When this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack while on the battlefield:

- this unit gains a Charge. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.
- this unit gains Recovery Mist for 100TU. Recovery Mist effects do not stack. A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn.
- all allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- another random ally is given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Greatsword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greatswords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.
